nonNegotiableContracts: Modeling-core work is additive and wrapper-based unless the user explicitly asks for a rewrite.
Current trace/state should be exposed honestly; missing future-model semantics belong in explicit gaps, not invented fields.
Turn semantics are snapshot-isolated and should not self-validate within the same turn.
Deterministic fixtures and JSON-safe traces are preferred for lab work.
boundaries: modeling-core harness and docs are the current core seam
scenario-lab and seed-proxy work are adjacent but should stay causally separate
UI changes should preserve existing analyst-console patterns and avoid parallel controls
currentRiskNotes: Confidence terminology is overloaded in the spec and can drift into ambiguous code/UI.
Docs describe future discovery simulation ideas that are not yet the source of truth for current behavior.
No documentation/ directory exists in this checkout; repo docs live under docs/.
